key_claims: Cost-effective (approx $3 per mani from a kit)

bond.name: Bond
bond.purpose: Dries the nail and removes excess oils before application. Ensures adhesion.
bond.when_used: Step 2 - applied to all nails before Base. Optional but recommended.

base.name: Base
base.purpose: The adhesive layer that powder sticks to. Applied before every dip. Also used to attach tips.
base.when_used: Steps 3-6 - applied repeatedly before each dip layer (clear and colour).
base.usage_notes: Most frequently used liquid. Applied in thin layers - getting closer to cuticle with each coat. Hold brush parallel to nail.

seal.name: Seal
seal.purpose: Activates and hardens the dip powder. Applied after all dipping is complete.
seal.when_used: Step 7-8 - applied liberally, dried 2 min, then filed/buffed, then second coat.
seal.usage_notes: Must dry completely before Glow is applied, otherwise top coat will be dull.

glow.name: Glow
glow.purpose: Glossy top coat for shine and protection. Also available in matte finish.
glow.when_used: Step 9 - two coats (first thin and quick, second slower). Applied after Seal is fully dry.
glow.usage_notes: Wipe brush clean before returning to bottle. Avoid strokes on skin edges to prevent cracking.

care.name: Care
care.purpose: Nourishing cuticle oil packed with botanicals, vitamins, and minerals. Hydrates and promotes healthy nail growth.
care.when_used: Step 10 - final step, applied to cuticles and massaged in. Recommended daily use.
care.usage_notes: Formerly called 'Heal'. Some older clips may show Heal-labelled bottles.

soak.name: Soak
soak.purpose: Rescues hardened brushes. Swap the cap with the damaged brush and leave to soak.
soak.when_used: As needed when a brush hardens from powder contact.

clear.name: Clear Powder
clear.purpose: Protective base/top layer. Used as first dip (under colour) and final dip (over colour) to protect pigments during filing.

colours.description: Wide range of dip powder colours. Customers choose their colours when purchasing a kit.
visual_identifiers: small round pots/jars with coloured powder

included_in_all_kits.name: 180 Grit Nail File
included_in_all_kits.purpose: Prep texturing, shaping, and smoothing after dipping

included_in_all_kits.name: 240 Grit Nail File
included_in_all_kits.purpose: Fine buffing to smooth nail surface

included_in_all_kits.name: Steel Cuticle Pusher
included_in_all_kits.purpose: Push back cuticles, shape cuticle line after dipping, scoop clear powder. Dual-ended - scooped end and pointed end.

included_in_all_kits.name: Dust Brush
included_in_all_kits.purpose: Remove excess powder from nail surface and cuticle area after each dip

includes.liquids: Full 5-step system (#1 Bond, #2 Base, #3 Seal, #4 Glow, #5 Care) + #6 Soak
includes.extras: Standard prep and application accessories (files, buffers, dust brushes, cuticle pusher)

application_process.description: The standard GlamrDip dip powder application process, broken into steps that map to the schema's process_steps_shown field.

steps_in_order.name: Prep
actions: File nail to create texture (180 grit)

steps_in_order.name: Bond
actions: Apply Bond to all nails to dehydrate
visual_cues: Applying liquid from bottle #1 to nails

steps_in_order.name: Base Application
actions: Apply thin layer of Base liquid to nail before each dip
visual_cues: Brush applying clear liquid to nail

steps_in_order.name: Clear Dip
actions: Dip nail into clear powder at 45 degrees

steps_in_order.name: Colour Dip
actions: Dip nail into colour powder at 45 degrees

steps_in_order.name: Brush Off Excess
actions: Brush away excess powder from nail and cuticle area

steps_in_order.name: Removal
actions: Soak in removal solution (snap-lock bag + rice bowl method)

troubleshooting_topics.description: Common problems and solutions - useful for identifying problem/comparison content in clips

issues.cause: Poor prep or Base on cuticles
Too thin/uneven application or wrong brush angle
Seal not dry before Glow applied
Powder contamination or wet Seal contact
issues.visual: Stiff brush that won't apply smoothly
